requirement_topic.en: SREDA, Renewable Project, and Utility Storage Review
requirement_topic.zh: SREDA、可再生能源项目和电网储能审查
requirement_topic.zht: SREDA、可再生能源項目和電網儲能審查

summary.en: Bangladesh storage attached to solar, net-metering, mini-grid, captive, distribution, or utility projects should be reviewed under the applicable SREDA policy or guideline, the Bangladesh Electricity Grid Code 2019 (BERC), utility interconnection process, project approval, power-purchase, metering, dispatch, and commissioning documents. The Grid Code 2019 is published by BERC and sets technical standards for all entities connecting to the Bangladesh grid, including generation and storage assets. A product certificate alone does not decide whether the storage asset is permitted to inject, absorb, provide backup, or provide grid services.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国与光伏、净计量、微电网、自备电源、配电或公用事业项目相连的储能，应按适用的SREDA政策或指引、孟加拉国电力法规委员会（BERC）发布的《2019年电力电网规程》（Grid Code 2019）、电网并网流程、项目批准、购电、计量、调度和调试文件审查。Grid Code 2019 规定了所有接入孟加拉国电网实体（包括发电和储能资产）的技术要求。单一产品证书本身不能决定储能资产是否可注入电力、吸收电力、提供备用或提供电网服务。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國與光伏、淨計量、微電網、自備電源、配電或公用事業項目相連的儲能，應按適用的SREDA政策或指引、孟加拉國電力法規委員會（BERC）發布的《2019年電力電網規程》（Grid Code 2019）、電網併網流程、項目批准、購電、計量、調度和調試文件審查。Grid Code 2019 規定了所有接入孟加拉國電網實體（包括發電和儲能資產）的技術要求。單一產品證書本身不能決定儲能資產是否可注入電力、吸收電力、提供備用或提供電網服務。

standards_or_laws: SREDA renewable-energy policy and guideline route applicable to the project

Bangladesh Electricity Grid Code 2019 (published by BERC — establishes technical requirements for connecting generation and storage to the Bangladesh grid; applicable to utility-scale and distribution-connected BESS)
Bangladesh net metering guideline where solar-plus-storage or customer interconnection is in scope
Utility interconnection, metering, commissioning, and dispatch requirements

summary.en: China grid approvals and GB/T 36558-2023 system reports can support a technical package, but they do not create Bangladesh SREDA approval, utility approval, tariff treatment, metering permission, or dispatch rights.
summary.zh: 中国并网批复和GB/T 36558-2023系统报告可支持技术资料包，但不能形成孟加拉国SREDA批准、电网批准、电价处理、计量许可或调度权利。
summary.zht: 中國併網批覆和GB/T 36558-2023系統報告可支持技術資料包，但不能形成孟加拉國SREDA批准、電網批准、電價處理、計量許可或調度權利。

gap.en: Classify the Bangladesh project role first: behind-the-meter backup, solar-plus-storage, net metering, captive generation, distribution asset, utility asset, mini-grid, or ancillary-service resource can trigger different SREDA, utility, tariff, metering, and commissioning expectations.
gap.zh: 应先界定孟加拉国项目角色：表后备用、光储、净计量、自备发电、配电资产、公用事业资产、微电网或辅助服务资源可能触发不同的SREDA、电网、电价、计量和调试要求。
gap.zht: 應先界定孟加拉國項目角色：表後備用、光儲、淨計量、自備發電、配電資產、公用事業資產、微電網或輔助服務資源可能觸發不同的SREDA、電網、電價、計量和調試要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the BESS is part of a regulated renewable-energy, net-metering, utility, tariff, grid-connection, or project-approval route; project-specific for standalone customer-side backup equipment
mandatory_status.cn: China grid approval obligations depend on project type, voltage level, market role, and grid-connection contract

source.publisher: Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority (SREDA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Define the Bangladesh storage use case before claiming SREDA, utility, tariff, or interconnection requirements. China grid documentation is supporting evidence, not Bangladesh approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在声称需要SREDA、电网、电价或并网要求前，应先界定孟加拉国储能用途。中国并网文件只是支持证据，不是孟加拉国批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在聲稱需要SREDA、電網、電價或併網要求前，應先界定孟加拉國儲能用途。中國併網文件只是支持證據，不是孟加拉國批准。
